summary: Comprehensive testing of Trend Syria e-commerce platform after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (~2500 lines) to modular architecture with 12 separate route files. All 37 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI testing completed successfully.

minor.info: JWT InsecureKeyLengthWarning in logs - HMAC key is 27 bytes (below 32 bytes recommended)

passed_tests: ✅ API Root endpoint /api/ - returns welcome message
✅ Auth /api/auth/me - Returns user data with valid token
✅ Products /api/products - Returns products list with pagination
✅ Cart /api/cart - Returns cart items for authenticated user
✅ Cart /api/cart/add - Adds product to cart successfully
✅ Stores /api/stores/{seller_id} - Returns store page with products
✅ Frontend: Homepage loads with hero, categories, products
✅ Frontend: Login modal works - customer login success
✅ Frontend: Product cards display with images, prices, 'جديد' badges
✅ Frontend: Product detail page shows info, shipping calculator
✅ Frontend: Cart page shows items and order summary
✅ Frontend: Orders page shows order history
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 8 stat cards
✅ Frontend: RTL Arabic layout working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all 12 route files properly integrated via APIRouter
JWT secret key is 27 bytes - consider using 32+ bytes for SHA256 compliance (warning only)
Good code organization: routes/, models/, core/ separation
seed_data_creation: Demo data created via /api/seed endpoint - includes admin, seller, buyer users and 8 demo products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular architecture completed successfully. 12 route files in /app/backend/routes/: auth.py, products.py, cart.py, orders.py, shipping.py, admin.py, notifications.py, stores.py, user.py, messages.py, reviews.py, delivery.py. All APIs tested and working. Test credentials: admin (0911111111/admin123), customer (0933333333/user123), seller (0922222222/seller123).

list: ShamCash Payment API - /api/payment/shamcash/verify accepts any 6-digit OTP for testing
